articles.title: About this site
articles.contents: This website is part of a Data Analysis course from UCSB. The content of it is constantly changing and adapting to the website coding skills of the owner. Ultimately, it will host the final projects of the course and other personal code.

            Pol Carbó Mestre
          
          
            
              I am a UCSB student in a Master of Environmental Science and Management at the Bren School. Currently diving into the data science underworld, and apparently learning website coding with R language. I love political memes and not making myself understand with my thick Spanish accent.
